description: Pre-baked Telegram message with reply context and conversation history

id.description: Database row ID of this message

chat_id.description: Telegram chat ID — use this for send-message --chat-id

text.description: The user's message text (may be null for image-only messages)

image_paths.description: Local file paths to attached images — use Read on each to view

oneOf.description: The full message the user is replying to (null if standalone)

id.description: Database row ID of the replied-to message

direction.description: in = user's own earlier message, out = system/worker message

source.description: Origin: worker_question, worker_plan, worker_progress, worker_result, concierg, user_text, etc.

text.description: Full text of the replied-to message

worker_id.description: Which worker sent this message (null if not worker-originated). Key signal for classification.

reply_to.description: reply_to.direction=out + reply_to.worker_id=N means message targets worker N. reply_to=null or reply_to.direction=in means standalone.

recent_chat.description: Last 8 messages in this chat for conversational context (chronological order)

recent_worker_events.description: Last 10 events for the worker if this message has worker context (chronological order)

type.description: Event type: plan_proposed, question_asked, worker_started, worker_completed, follow_up, etc.
